references.title: Analysing User Experience of Dynamic Group Formation (DGF) in Intelligent Tutor Collaborative Learning (ITSCL) using Aspect-Based Sentiment Analysis

annotations.text: Dynamic group formation (groups that adjust) is helpful in computer supported collaborative learning settings. The work explores how groups are formed in an ITS designed for collaborative learning and evaluate the user experience of their users. Feedback is collected via a questionnaire.
Results show that users are receptive to the dynaimic group formation feature of the ITS as users report to be satisfied with the system’s flexibility, adaptatibility and interactivity.
